act_name: The Value Added Tax and Supplementary Duty Act
section_title: Determination of value of taxable imports.—The value of a taxable
content:
28. Determination of value of taxable imports.—The value of a taxable
import shall be the summation of the following amounts‚ namely:—
(a) the value of the goods determined for the imposition of import duty
under the Customs Act; and
(b) the amounts, if any, of customs duty, supplementary duty, or other
taxes (other than VAT and advance income tax) payable on the
import of the goods.

sub_sections.text:
the value of the goods determined for the imposition of import duty
under the Customs Act; and

the amounts, if any, of customs duty, supplementary duty, or other
taxes (other than VAT and advance income tax) payable on the
import of the goods.
